Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Changelog: Bugfixes: vendor sales no longer double-log as catchall rows (Block/Unblock added around the sell action in both Hawk and Triage paths); a one-shot migration cleans up existing duplicate catchall rows. Retainer Gil in the Portfolio summary survives zone changes (carries forward from the last retainer-wallet snapshot instead of zeroing on teleport).
